overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt trail through a sunlit forested wilderness with telegraph poles and distant mountains, encountering a horse-drawn carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested wilderness trail with telegraph lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the forested wilderness

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with crossbars lining the left side of the trail
wires stretching between the telegraph poles overhead
unpaved path with grass growing on the edges and tire tracks in the center
dense coniferous trees surrounding the trail
massive gray boulder formation alongside the trail
snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt trail through a forested wilderness area. Telegraph poles line the left side of the path while a large rock outcrop sits prominently to the right, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley trail with approaching vehicle

events.description: horse-drawn carriage appears on the trail ahead and is passed

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a horse-drawn carriage on the trail, then continuing toward the open valley

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving slowly along the trail, passed by the character on the left

entered.detail: wooden wagon with two horses and a driver, moving along the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail and encounters a horse-drawn carriage, walking past it on the left side. After passing the wagon, the large rock formation falls behind while the trail opens up to reveal a wide grassy valley with distant mountains ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit dirt trail that winds through a vast, forested wilderness. It begins by tracking a character walking forward, with telegraph poles lining the left side of the path. As the camera advances, the view opens to reveal a prominent rock outcrop on the right. The scene then expands to showcase the scale of the environment, finally bringing the distant, snow-capped mountains into clear focus against the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from a confined wooded path into a vast, open valley. It begins with the character walking forward and encountering a horse-drawn carriage, passing it on the left as the journey continues. As the wagon is left behind, the surrounding landscape shifts, and a large rock formation recedes into the distance. The scene then opens up as the trail leads out of the enclosure, revealing a wide grassy valley with towering mountains stretching across the horizon.
